summary: UWY40AY has cooling capacity 37 kW with 1 compressor.

summary: UWY50AY has cooling capacity 45 kW with 1 compressor.

summary: UWY60AY has cooling capacity 60 kW with 1 compressor.

summary: UWY100AY has cooling capacity 45 kW × 2 compressors.

title: Installation clearance requirements
summary: Minimum clearance: 500mm above, 1200mm on sides for air intake/discharge.

summary: Remote controller input is DC 5V, 10mA.

title: Temperature difference setting values
summary: Temperature difference settings: 4°C, 11.4°C, 20°C for cooling; 4°C, 13.1°C, 20°C for heating.

title: Default temperature difference values
summary: Default temperature difference: 4°C for cooling, 4°C for heating.
